     The Numbers Business Report

The Ministry of Ungentlemanly Warfare (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,535,053Details
International Box Office $6,459,360
Worldwide Box Office $26,994,413
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,281,531
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,455,193
Total $4,736,724
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story of the first-ever special forces organization formed during WWII by UK Prime Minister Winston Churchill and a small group of military officials including author Ian Fleming. The top-secret combat unit, composed of a motley crew of rogues and mavericks, goes on a daring mission against the Nazis using entirely unconventional and utterly “ungentlemanly” fighting techniques. Ultimately their audacious approach changed the course of the war and laid the foundation for the British SAS and modern Black Ops warfare.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,913,698 (43.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:76.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,845 opening theaters/2,845 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $21,715,234

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 19th, 2024 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: April 25th, 2024 (Wide), released as The Ministry of Ungentlemanly Warfare (Министерство неджентльменских дел) (Russia (CIS))
May 24th, 2024 (Wide), released as The Ministry of Ungentlemanly Warfare (盟军敢死队) (China)
March 19th, 2025 (Limited) (South Korea)
April 4th, 2025 (Wide), released as The Ministry of Ungentlemanly Warfare (アンジェントルメン) (Japan)
Video Release: May 10th, 2024 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence throughout and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2829 (cert #54755), 4/10/2024)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Filming location (country): Turkey
Plot point: Nazis, Special Ops
Social setting: World War II
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Time period setting: 1930s
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Black Bear, Jerry Bruckheimer Films, Media Capital Technologies
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The story of the first-ever special forces organization formed during WWII by UK Prime Minister Winston Churchill and a small group of military officials including author Ian Fleming. The top-secret combat unit, composed of a motley crew of rogues and mavericks, goes on a daring mission against the Nazis using entirely unconventional and utterly “ungentlemanly” fighting techniques. Ultimately their audacious approach changed the course of the war and laid the foundation for the British SAS and modern Black Ops warfare.
